Notes: Add a CNAME at an owner that already has an A RRset, then query both A and CNAME to observe whether the server rejects the update or applies it inconsistently.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add a CNAME at multi.campus.edu., which already has an A RRset.

Steps.Name: multi.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original A RRset remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: multi.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether a CNAME RRset was installed at the same owner name.
